title: Wizard review-mode rollout — prototypes + Phase 1–4 (full stack to main)
body:
## Summary

This consolidates **all the wizard review-mode work** from this thread into a single merge against `main`. The PRs landed on stacked branches as we went — none of them reached `main`. This retargets the topmost branch (`claude/phase4-narrative-generation`, which sits at the top of the stack) so all 14 commits drop onto main with one merge button.

## What lands

**Design exploration (commits from PRs #26–29, #31)**
- Six standalone HTML prototypes in `prototypes/` (Decision Queue, Narrative Briefing, Capability Briefing, Capability Narrative, Capability Queue, Review Wizard).
- `index.html` launcher.
- `StaticFiles` mount at `/prototypes/` so they're reachable on the dev server.

**Phase 1 — Wizard end-to-end** *(was PR #34)*
- New `/reviews/{review_id}/wizard` route + `dashboard/human_wizard.html` template.
- Capabilities computed by the same path-prefix heuristic the chapter view uses.
- Decisions = surfaced (non-dismissed) findings, sorted by severity per capability.
- W/W/H stubbed from PR title + body + file-role distribution.
- Per-concern `Accept / Fix / Dismiss / clear` wired to the existing dismissal API (`acknowledged / will_fix / false_positive`). State is shared bidirectionally with the chapter view.
- Final-verdict buttons (`Approve / Approve with fixes / Decline`) wired to a new `POST /api/dashboard/reviews/{id}/submit-verdict` endpoint that posts to GitHub or Azure DevOps via the existing `PlatformAdapter` factory.
- Audit trail via `pipeline_log` f
